---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement
What problem are you trying to solve? What gap exists in the current kit?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature you'd like.

## Why existing tools/hooks don't solve it
(Important — helps avoid duplicate functionality.)

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you think about?

## Additional context
Links, screenshots, code examples, related issues.
